# PERF-057 positive: Gin middleware that reads the body with io.ReadAll
lang: go
file: PERF-057-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func MiddlewareBind(c *gin.Context) {
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(c.Request.Body)
	_ = body
	c.Request.Body.Close()
	c.Next()
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
